rows.label: qev051504_MSG0001
rows.name:
Heheh! [ST:playername ]!
Slovity Pagus is your next opponent![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051504_MSG0002
rows.name:
I know exactly what kind of warrior you are
since we fought together before![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051504_MSG0003
rows.name:
Ever since I heard my opponent was you,
my whole body has been burning up uncontrollably![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051504_MSG0004
rows.name:
Now! I'm going all out for the first time in a while!
If you dawdle, I'll eat you alive![ST:wait ]
